params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address. Use `me` for the current user in user-level apps.

params.name: type
params.description: The type of meeting. `scheduled` - All valid previous (unexpired) meetings, live meetings, and upcoming scheduled meetings. `live` - All the ongoing meetings. `upcoming` - All upcoming meetings including live meetings. `upcoming_meetings` - All upcoming meetings including live meetings. `previous_meetings` - All the previous meetings.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned per API call. Maximum is 300.

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: The next page token to paginate through large result sets. A next_page_token is returned in the response when a result set exceeds the page_size.

params.name: page_number
params.description: The page number of the current results.

items.docs: List all the meetings that were scheduled for a user. For user-level apps, pass the `me` value instead of the userId parameter.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address. Use `me` for the current user in user-level apps.

items.docs: Create a meeting for a user. For user-level apps, pass the `me` value instead of the userId parameter. A meeting can be scheduled, instant, or recurring.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: occurrence_id
params.description: Meeting occurrence ID for recurring meetings.

params.name: show_previous_occurrences
params.description: Set to true to view meeting details of all previous occurrences of a recurring meeting.

items.docs: Retrieve the details of a meeting. This returns detailed information about the specified meeting including settings, recurrence, and tracking fields.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: occurrence_id
params.description: Meeting occurrence ID for recurring meeting updates.

items.docs: Update the details of a meeting. This can include topic, start time, duration, settings, and other meeting options.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: occurrence_id
params.description: Meeting occurrence ID for recurring meeting deletion.

params.name: schedule_for_reminder
params.description: Notify host and alternative host about the meeting cancellation via email.

params.name: cancel_meeting_reminder
params.description: Notify registrants about the meeting cancellation via email.

items.docs: Delete a meeting. This permanently removes the meeting from Zoom.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

items.docs: End a meeting by updating its status. This can also recover a deleted meeting within a certain time frame.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting UUID. Each meeting instance will generate its own UUID. Double-encode if the UUID begins with `/` or contains `//`.

items.docs: Retrieve information about a past meeting. The meeting UUID must be double-encoded if it contains `/` or `//` characters.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

items.docs: Retrieve the meeting invitation note for a specific meeting.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: occurrence_id
params.description: Meeting occurrence ID for recurring meetings.

params.name: status
params.description: Registrant status filter.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned per API call. Maximum is 300.

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: The next page token to paginate through large result sets. A next_page_token is returned in the response when a result set exceeds the page_size.

items.docs: List all registrants for a meeting. Returns the list of users who registered for the meeting.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: occurrence_ids
params.description: A comma-separated list of occurrence IDs for recurring meetings.

items.docs: Register a participant for a meeting. A host or alternative host can also add registrants on behalf of other users.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: occurrence_id
params.description: Meeting occurrence ID for recurring meetings.

items.docs: Approve or deny a meeting registrant. Also allows cancellation of a previously approved registrant.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

items.docs: Register up to 30 registrants at once for a meeting that requires registration.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: anonymous
params.description: Whether to query anonymous polls.

items.docs: List all polls for a meeting.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

items.docs: Create a poll for a meeting. Meeting must be a scheduled meeting. Instant meetings do not have polling features enabled.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: pollId
params.description: The poll ID.

items.docs: Retrieve details of a specific meeting poll.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: pollId
params.description: The poll ID.

items.docs: Update a specific meeting poll.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: pollId
params.description: The poll ID.

items.docs: Delete a specific meeting poll.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned per API call. Maximum is 300.

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: The next page token to paginate through large result sets. A next_page_token is returned in the response when a result set exceeds the page_size.

params.name: include_fields
params.description: Provide `registrant_id` to include the registrant_id field in the response.

items.docs: List participants from a past meeting instance. Only available for paid accounts with the Dashboard feature enabled.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting UUID.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned per API call. Maximum is 300.

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: The next page token to paginate through large result sets. A next_page_token is returned in the response when a result set exceeds the page_size.

items.docs: Retrieve information on participants from a past meeting. The API does not return results if the meeting is less than 5 minutes old.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

items.docs: Update the live stream configuration of a meeting. The meeting host must configure live streaming settings before the meeting starts.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

items.docs: Update the status of a live stream during a meeting. Use this to start or stop live streaming.

info.name: Zoom Get a Meeting's Join Token for Live Streaming

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

items.docs: Get a meeting's join token to allow live streaming. The join token allows a recording bot or live streaming service to join the meeting.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: include_fields
params.description: Additional fields to include in the response.

params.name: ttl
params.description: Time to live in seconds for the download URL.

items.docs: Retrieve all recordings for a specific meeting. Cloud recordings are available to paid accounts with cloud recording enabled.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

params.name: action
params.description: Delete action. `trash` moves to trash. `delete` permanently deletes.

items.docs: Delete all recording files of a meeting. The recording files will be moved to trash and permanently deleted after 30 days.
